dashboard.label: Banking Threat Monitor
dashboard.description: Real-time Banking Threat Detection — SWIFT, CBS, ATM, Payment Systems

search.query: index=bankstack_wazuh (rule.groups{}="atm" OR rule.groups{}="card_fraud") rule.level>=10 | stats count
index=bankstack_wazuh (rule.groups{}="beftn" OR rule.groups{}="npsb" OR rule.groups{}="rtgs") rule.level>=10 | stats count
index=bankstack_wazuh rule.groups{}="swift" action="SWIFT_MSG_SENT" | timechart span=1h sum(data.amount_usd) as amount_usd, count as msg_count
index=bankstack_wazuh rule.groups{}="swift" action="SWIFT_MSG_SENT" | stats sum(data.amount_usd) as total_usd, count by data.dest_country | sort -total_usd
index=bankstack_wazuh rule.groups{}="cbs" action="CBS_TRANSACTION" | timechart span=1h sum(data.amount_bdt) as amount_bdt, count as txn_count
index=bankstack_wazuh rule.groups{}="cbs" rule.level>=10 | stats count by data.branch | sort -count | head 15

index=bankstack_wazuh rule.groups{}="atm" rule.level>=10 | stats count, values(rule.description) as threats by data.atm_id, data.atm_location | sort -count | rename data.atm_id as "ATM ID", data.atm_location as "Location", threats as "Threat Types"

index=bankstack_wazuh (rule.groups{}="beftn" OR rule.groups{}="npsb" OR rule.groups{}="rtgs") rule.level>=10 | table _time, rule.description, data.source_bank, data.dest_bank, data.amount_bdt | sort -_time | head 20

panel.title: File Integrity Alerts — Critical Banking Systems

search.query: index=bankstack_wazuh rule.groups{}="syscheck" rule.groups{}="banking" | table _time, syscheck.path, syscheck.event, rule.description, rule.level | sort -_time | head 30 | rename syscheck.path as "File Path", syscheck.event as "Event", rule.description as "Description", rule.level as "Severity"
